items.title: Adjusting these figures slightly, as Young's new contract is reported to start at the 30% max amount of $49.5M:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Adjusting these figures slightly, as Young's new contract is reported to start at the 30% max amount of $49.5M:

26-27: $49.5M
27-28: $51.9M
28-29: $54.5M
29-30: $56.9M (player option)

Total: $212.85M (matches what Young could have gotten from another team as a FA)

items.title: Trae Young’s deal could start as low as $47.3 million and end at $58.7 million if it’s ascending.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Trae Young’s deal could start as low as $47.3 million and end at $58.7 million if it’s ascending.

They could also start higher and end lower since they could give him larger raises.

I’ll use this projection based on the Wizards’ recent track record of flat/descending contracts.
